signals.title: How Endava is redesigning software delivery around AI agents
signals.summary: Learn how Endava is using AI agents, ChatGPT Enterprise, and Codex to accelerate software delivery, automate workflows, and build an AI-native culture across the enterprise.
signals.aiSummary: Endava利用AI代理和ChatGPT企业版重新设计软件交付流程，构建AI原生文化

signals.title: Dreaming: Better memory for a more helpful ChatGPT
signals.summary: ChatGPT introduces a new memory system to better remember preferences, keeping context fresh and relevant across conversations.
signals.aiSummary: ChatGPT推出新记忆系统，能跨对话记住用户偏好，提升交互体验和个性化服务能力

signals.title: A blueprint for democratic governance of frontier AI
signals.summary: OpenAI outlines a blueprint for U.S. governance of frontier AI, proposing a federal framework for safety, resilience, and national security.
signals.aiSummary: OpenAI提出美国前沿AI治理蓝图，建议联邦框架管理AI安全与国家安全

signals.title: OpenAI public policy agenda
signals.summary: OpenAI outlines its public policy agenda for AI, including safety, youth protection, workforce transition, and global standards to ensure AI benefits society.
signals.aiSummary: OpenAI发布公共政策议程，涵盖AI安全、青少年保护、劳动力转型和全球标准制定

signals.title: Codex is becoming a productivity tool for everyone
signals.summary: The Next Era of Knowledge Work report explores how Codex is transforming productivity through AI-powered research, data analysis, workflow automation, and content creation.
signals.aiSummary: Codex正在成为通用生产力工具，通过AI驱动研究、数据分析、工作流自动化和内容创作来变革知识工作

signals.title: Building the infrastructure for the Intelligence Age in Michigan
signals.summary: OpenAI breaks ground on a 1GW data center project in Michigan as part of Stargate, building AI infrastructure to expand access, create jobs, and support communities.
signals.aiSummary: OpenAI在密歇根启动1GW数据中心项目，作为星门计划一部分建设AI基础设施

signals.title: OpenAI frontier models and Codex are now available on AWS
signals.summary: OpenAI frontier models and Codex are now generally available on AWS, giving enterprises a new path to build with OpenAI through the AWS environments, controls, and procurement workflows they already use. Customers can get started with OpenAI on AWS and move faster from evaluation to production.
signals.aiSummary: OpenAI模型通过AWS正式提供企业服务，为AI应用部署开辟新的云平台入口

signals.title: MUFG aims to become AI-native with OpenAI
signals.summary: MUFG uses ChatGPT Enterprise to build an AI-native organization, improve workflows, and deliver new AI-powered financial services at scale.
signals.aiSummary: 日本最大银行MUFG通过ChatGPT Enterprise构建AI原生组织，推动金融服务AI化转型
